lines.text: Instead of praying here every day, why don't you go fix the fishing boat?
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow

lines.text: That's not the Sentinel. It's nothing more than a pile of stones you've gathered.
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow

lines.text: The Sentinel guided us here to build a new home, yet you would dare lay every little misfortune at Their feet. It is you who dishonor the Sentinel.
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow
